caption: A man with short dark hair, wearing a light-colored collared shirt, is seen inside a vehicle. He is positioned in the driver's seat, looking ahead and speaking. Through the vehicle's windows, a flat, arid landscape with sparse vegetation is visible under a clear sky. In the initial frames, the camera is close to the man, showing his profile. On-screen text appears, stating "I'm Hamdi Shadah Saleem El Dajah" and then "and I work for IOM". As the sequence progresses, the camera angle widens to show the interior of the vehicle, including the steering wheel, the dashboard with a small electronic device, and the rearview mirror. The final frame features the text "I work in Tal al-Shihab transporting refugees" as the man continues to drive through the rural environment.
